object_under_evaluation: integrity of contradiction-visible memo consumption on lifecycle-aware object recall paths
claim_boundary: On this bounded lifecycle-aware memo family, the consumer can often keep contradiction posture visible across preferred, superseded, and withdrawn objects, but that support weakens when a compact summary smooths an unresolved tension into a cleaner current story than the memo surfaces justify.
limitations: This report does not prove contradiction resolution quality outside public memo surfaces.
This report does not prove permission or authority safety from memo fields.
This report does not prove promotion discipline or merge-hallucination resistance.
case_family: memo-contradiction-guardrail-v1 bounded lifecycle-aware object recall family
strongest_contradiction_signal: The object-facing read preserved the preferred claim, the historical superseded claim, the withdrawn rival, and the audit walkback without pretending they all shared one active posture.
strongest_contradiction_risk: A compact summary nearly treated unresolved tension as settled because the fresher preferred claim sounded cleaner than the contradictory historical trail.

case_notes.lifecycle_note: The preferred claim stayed preferred while the withdrawn rival remained visibly withdrawn and the superseded claim remained historical.
case_notes.current_recall_note: Current recall posture stayed visible, but the compact summary leaned too close to a single clean active answer.
case_notes.contradiction_note: Contradiction refs stayed explicit between the preferred claim and the withdrawn rival instead of disappearing during the capsule step.
case_notes.audit_or_replacement_note: Audit walkback remained reachable, though the replacement story was easier to read than the unresolved tension it was meant to accompany.

case_notes.lifecycle_note: The case preserved historical versus withdrawn posture clearly enough that no silent replacement reading was possible.
case_notes.current_recall_note: The consumer kept the current entrypoint explicit without pretending the contradictory history had vanished.
case_notes.contradiction_note: Still-open tension stayed visible through the provenance-thread timeline rather than being summarized away.
case_notes.audit_or_replacement_note: Provenance walkback supplied the honest bounded trace when the compact object surface alone was not sufficient.
